announcement.text: Applications for the 18th Vidya Vritti scholarship are now open.

stories.name: Shivani Mishra
stories.achievement: IIT Bombay — Electrical Engineering Dual Degree
stories.quote: I remember the day I got the call that CSB had selected me. My father is a contract worker at BSL. We had never imagined IIT was a real possibility for someone like me — until CSB showed me it was.

stories.name: Nitesh Kr Mahato
stories.achievement: 98% in Class XII · Bokaro District Topper · 3rd in Jharkhand
stories.location: Bokaro Steel City → Engineering College, Jharkhand
stories.quote: People in my mohalla thought scoring above 80% was exceptional. I didn't know that 98 was possible — or that I was capable of it. CSB didn't just give me money. They gave me belief.

stories.name: Akash Kumar
stories.quote: I was the first person in my family to move out of Bokaro for work. I was the first to own a laptop. CSB was the first domino — everything else followed from that.

vidyaVritti.name: Vidya Vritti
vidyaVritti.tagline: Full Class XI–XII scholarship — fees, books, uniform, mentorship

pratibhaPoshan.name: Pratibha Poshan
pratibhaPoshan.tagline: Monthly support for Classes VII–X to nurture early talent

prerna.name: Prerna
prerna.tagline: Annual talk series where CSB alumni and scholars share their journeys
prerna.format: Live talks by scholars and community members
